messages.content: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal coding agent. Preserve exact CA hex bytes and return runnable Python when asked for code. For CA arithmetic, abs is opcode 0x09 and add is opcode 0x00. The sequence for abs(a)+abs(b) is exactly 0x09, 0x09, 0x00.
Reviewer asks for the CA byte plan for absolute value of x plus absolute value of y. Give the bytes and names.

CA: 0x09, 0x09, 0x00
ops: abs(a), abs(b), add
map: abs=0x09; add=0x00
